title: justicia fallax
intro: Justicia fallax, a flowering plant native to tropical Africa, is a member of the Acanthaceae family and is commonly known as the False Bugle or False Justicia. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic activities. The health benefits of Justicia fallax include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a diuretic and to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Justicia fallax include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
